creator: barzog@telecom.by
text:
Here's update to 1.4.16.2.
Now with pf support.

Fix: PORTNAME=      smtp-gated
-PORTVERSION=   1.4.12.r9
+PORTVERSION=   1.4.16.2
 PORTREVISION=  1
 CATEGORIES=    mail
-MASTER_SITES=  http://smtp-proxy.klolik.org/
-DISTNAME=      ${PORTNAME}-1.4.12-rc9
+MASTER_SITES=  http://software.klolik.org/smtp-gated/files/
+DISTNAME=      ${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}

 MAINTAINER=    ports@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=       This software block SMTP sessions used by e-mail worms and viruses
